creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194133
py-ciscoconfparse-1.3.18.patch

Meanwhile py-ciscoconfparse has been updated to 1.3.18 .

Changes by upstream (including the changes from 13.1.16):
- add * to MANIFEST.in
- attempt to resolve Github issue #106
- add dns_query() zone transfer as text

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
